nasb.text: The blood avenger himself shall put the murderer to death; he shall put him to death when he meets him.

esv.text: The avenger of blood shall himself put the murderer to death; when he meets him, he shall put him to death.

cnv.text: 報血仇的，要親自把那故意殺人的殺死；一遇見他，就可以殺死他。

ccb.text: 报仇的人要亲自处死故意杀人者，一找到他就要处死他。
